title: Reporting Dashboard — Centralized Reports Workspace with Three Report Categories
description: The system shall provide a centralized Reports workspace organizing available reports into three categories: Operational Reports, Compliance Reports, and Integration Reports.

title: Report Catalog — Role-Filtered Report Availability
description: Users shall see only reports authorized for their role.

title: Report Builder UX — Standardized Filter Panel Across All Reports
description: Each report shall provide a standardized filter panel. Common filters: employer group, plan year, as-of date, employment status, plan, and coverage tier. Report-specific filters are added per report.

title: Enrollment Census Report — Current Enrollment Status Per Employee Per Benefit
description: The Enrollment Census report shows each employee's current enrollment status for all offered benefit types. Exportable to CSV/Excel/PDF.

title: ACA Eligibility Status Report — Hours, ACA Classification, and Offer Status
description: The system shall generate an ACA eligibility status report. This is an operational ACA eligibility report, not necessarily the final IRS 1094-C/1095-C filing output unless that functionality is explicitly implemented.
complianceDisclaimer: Operational ACA eligibility report. Not a substitute for IRS 1094-C/1095-C filings unless explicitly implemented.

title: Dependent Verification Report — Verification Status Per Dependent
description: The system shall generate a report of dependent verification status per employee and dependent. Directly supports the Dependent Documentation Upload & Verification workflow.

title: Benefits Cost Summary — Employer and Employee Costs by Plan, Tier, and Period
description: The system shall provide a benefits cost summary report showing plan enrollment counts, employer cost, employee cost, and total cost. Supports monthly, quarterly, and annualized periods.

title: Life Event Activity Report — Life Events by Type, Status, and Documentation
description: The system shall report life event activity with filters by event type, status, date range, documentation status, and employer.

title: Open Enrollment Completion Report — Completion and Submission Rates
description: The system shall provide an open enrollment progress report showing eligible employees, started, submitted, pending, and not started. Employee-level completion detail is included.

title: Eligibility Exceptions Report — Open Exceptions with Links to Eligibility Workspace
description: The system shall provide a report of eligibility exceptions. Each exception links directly to the Eligibility Workspace for resolution.

title: Carrier Transaction Report — Exportable Log of All Carrier Transactions
description: The system shall provide an exportable carrier transaction report with full transaction detail including error codes and descriptions.

title: Payroll Deduction Report — Per-Employee Deduction Code, Frequency, and Amount
description: The system shall provide payroll deduction reporting showing each employee's active deduction records. Reconciles directly with the Payroll Transmission Lifecycle.

title: Reconciliation Report — Three-Way Match: Benefits vs. Carrier vs. Payroll
description: The system shall provide a three-way reconciliation report showing matching and mismatched records across benefits enrollment, carrier enrollment, and payroll deductions.

title: Report Preview — Record Count, Active Filters, and Export Buttons
description: Before export, users shall see a report preview showing total record count, active filter summary, and export action buttons.

title: Export History — Log of All Generated Reports with Download Links
description: The system should maintain a log of all report generation events showing report type, generated by, record count, format, timestamp, and status.

title: Scheduled Reports — Recurring Report Delivery on Configured Frequency
description: P2: Authorized users may schedule recurring reports with configurable frequency, delivery method (email and/or in-app), format, and recipient list.
demoExample: Every Monday at 8:00 AM, send the Open Enrollment Completion Report to the Benefits Operations team.

title: Report Access Control — Role-Based Data Visibility Rules
description: Reports shall enforce data access rules per persona. SSN and highly sensitive fields must never appear in standard exports unless explicitly authorized.
securityConstraint: SSN must never appear in standard report exports

title: Report Data Freshness — Display Data As-Of Timestamp
description: Each report shall display its data freshness: the as-of timestamp for the report data and the last carrier synchronization time. For the demo, these can be simulated.
